title: A message from Trump? A symbol of peace was cut from US dimes.
shortDescription: The design was finalized in 2024, before Trump took office. The artist and U.S. Mint say it symbolizes the early U.S. quest for freedom from Britain.

title: Will RFK Jr.'s MAHA voters ditch GOP in midterm elections?
shortDescription: Trump's recent executive order to increase the production of glyphosate might derail MAHA voters' support for the GOP, the movement’s leaders say.

title: President names new Trump-Kennedy Center head in staff shakeup
shortDescription: Richard Grenell, a close foreign policy adviser to President Donald Trump, is exiting his role leading the Trump-Kennedy Center for the Arts.

title: GOP Congressman says ‘Muslims don’t belong’ in America
shortDescription: GOP Rep. Andy Ogles under fire for saying "Muslims don't belong" in U.S.; and Trump won't sign laws until SAVE Act passes.

title: Protesters, congressional candidate try to block ICE in Illinois
shortDescription: U.S. House candidate Kat Abughazaleh joined demonstrators outside a US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) center in Chicago in September.

title: TN billboard asks for stories about Derek Dooley. Thank GA Democrats
shortDescription: The Democratic Party of Georgia has taken the Senate race to Tennessee after posting a billboard asking for stories about Derek Dooley in Knoxville.

title: ¿Qué negocian Cuba y Trump? La Habana confirma conversaciones
shortDescription: Cuba confirma conversaciones con la administración Trump en medio de una crisis energética. ¿Se acerca un nuevo acuerdo histórico con EE. UU.?

title: Congresswoman accused Trump of snub. Her invite went to spam
shortDescription: Rep. Joyce Beatty's lawsuit against President Donald Trump over the Kennedy Center took a wrong turn when her meeting invite turned up in spam.

title: Cuba confirms talks with Trump. Could a deal with the US be next?
shortDescription: Cuba's leader signals he's open to signing an economic deal with the Trump administration as the White House cuts off fuel supplies.

title: From the ER to the ballot: Doctors run to challenge RFK Jr.'s agenda
shortDescription: Doctors and scientists are running for office, motivated by concerns over health policy, anti-science movements, and cuts to social programs.

title: Trump, Melania mark Women’s History Month at White House
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump appeared together at a Women's History Month event at the White House on March 12, 2026.

title: Trump reacts to 'terrible' synagogue attack
shortDescription: President Donald Trump sent prayers to the Michigan Jewish community after an attack at a West Bloomfield synagogue.
